untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) ADF stationarity test at 99% confidence level - not available in indicator set; (2) Linear mean-reverting strategy application - requires custom statistical model; (3) Z-score threshold calculation on calendar spread - requires spread construction and standardization not in base indicators; (4) Specific half-life calculation (36 days) - requires half-life decay modeling; (5) Calendar spread construction from futures contracts - requires multi-leg spread calculation not in base indicators
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using log_returns as proxy for spread mean-reversion, but core signal logic depends on advanced time-series analysis (ADF test, half-life, z-scores on constructed calendar spreads) beyond the allowed indicator set. This signal requires custom preprocessing and statistical validation before standard backtesting can occur.
